calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-21-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came as reassigment from the PJ Department.
Judge: Ollie Marie Victoire, CSR: Ann Mendoza, Bailiff: Louise Perotti, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Scott I. Bassin, Esq. for Plaintiffs Malvar Velasco and Zenaida Velasco.
Raquel Corona, Esq. for Defendants: Lawrence Lewis and Kathleen Lewis
Stipulation for entry of judgment read on the record as follows:
Plaintiff is entitled to a future judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at: 4030 Pacheco Street, lower unit, SF
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Securrity deposit is forfeited.
If defendants vacate the premises on or before August 31, 2003, plaintiff waives all back rent and damages and will dismiss this matter with prejudice.
Each party waives claim against the other.
Each to bears its own costs and attorney's fees.
Any items left in the premises will be disposed of.
If defendant did not comply with the agreement, plaintiff may so state by ex parte declaration, with 24 hours notice to the defendant and have judgment entered for possession and back rent in the amount of $1,425.00 plus attorneys fees and costs.
Defendant waives any right to make a motion to set aside or vacate the judgment, or to apply for a stay or relief from forfeiture.
Defendants shall leave the premises clean when they vacate.
Plaintiff to provide a working telephone jack inside defendant's rental unit.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-21-2003 Assigned To Trial Court
